inputs.name: icon
inputs.description:
Defines the icon to be displayed as graphical element within the `ui5-timeline-item`.
SAP-icons font provides numerous options.

See all the available icons in the [Icon Explorer](https://sdk.openui5.org/test-resources/sap/m/demokit/iconExplorer/webapp/index.html).

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Defines the name of the item, displayed before the `title-text`.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: Defines the state of the icon displayed in the `ui5-timeline-item`.

inputs.name: subtitleText
inputs.description: Defines the subtitle text of the component.

inputs.name: titleText
inputs.description: Defines the title text of the component.

outputs.name: ui5NameClick
outputs.description:
Fired when the item name is pressed either with a
click/tap or by using the Enter or Space key.

*Note:** The event will not be fired if the `name-clickable`
attribute is not set.
